◎简　　介  

　　A conservative lawyer named Diane takes her two teenage children Jake and Zoe (played by Nat Wolff and Elizabeth Olsen) to meet their estranged, hippie grandmother in Woodstock after her husband asks for a divorce. While there, Diane begins to regret her decision of coming, and Jake finds love.

director.name: 布鲁斯·贝尔斯福德 Bruce Beresford
